summary: Completed frontend testing for FESA Global website logo and layout updates. All major features working correctly including logo images, navigation, responsive design, and testimonials marquee.
passed_tests: Logo image displays correctly in header with proper alt text
Logo image displays correctly in footer with proper alt text
FESA GLOBAL text is centered below globe in hero section
All navigation links work (Home, Services, Regions, About, Stories)
No horizontal scrolling/overflow issues on desktop
No horizontal scrolling/overflow issues on mobile
Testimonials section loads with marquee elements
